signIn.title: Sign In
signIn.subtitle: Enter your email and password to sign in
signIn.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

signUp.title: Sign Up
signUp.subtitle: Enter your email and password to sign up
signUp.agreeText: By creating an account means you agree to the
signUp.isTourGuideDescription: Register as a tour guide to manage your profile and tours
signUp.successMessage: Your account has been created. Please sign in.
signUp.errorGeneric: Could not create account. Please try again.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Your Password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter the email address linked to your account, and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.successMessage: A reset link has been sent to your email.
forgotPassword.errorNotFound: No account found with this email.
forgotPassword.errorGeneric: Could not send reset link. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Set New Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password below. The link is valid for 5 minutes.
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been changed successfully. You can now sign in.
resetPassword.errorExpired: This link has expired. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.errorGeneric: Could not reset password. Please try again.
